vocab.meaning: trở nên thư thái, dễ chịu hơn
vocab.example: I love listening to the soft pitter-patter of rain because it really helps me mellow out after a frantic day.

vocab.meaning: thả lỏng tâm trí, không chú ý đến xung quanh
vocab.example: The consistent whirring of a fan is a type of white noise that allows me to zone out and find inner peace.

vocab.meaning: át đi, làm lu mờ (âm thanh khác)
vocab.example: I prefer the sound of instrumental jazz as it perfectly drowns out the unpleasant clamor of the construction nearby.

vocab.meaning: thả hồn theo, chìm đắm vào (cảm giác xa xăm)
vocab.example: When I hear the distant chime of church bells, I tend to drift away into a world of nostalgia.

vocab.meaning: trở nên phấn chấn, tỉnh táo hơn
vocab.example: My mood always perks up the moment I hear the morning birdsong outside my bedroom window.
Putting on some ambient forest sounds helps me block out the distracting chatter in the open-plan office.

vocab.meaning: cất tiếng, vang lên (thường là âm thanh cao hoặc bất ngờ)
vocab.example: I find it quite charming when the crickets pipe up in the evening during my walk through the park.

vocab.meaning: giảm bớt căng thẳng, trở nên nhẹ nhàng hơn
vocab.example: The sound of rolling thunder as a storm begins to ease off is incredibly soothing to my ears.

vocab.meaning: gợi nhắc về (điều gì đó trong quá khứ)
vocab.example: The crackling of a bonfire harks back to my childhood camping trips and the warmth of the hearth.

vocab.meaning: nghỉ ngơi, thư giãn dần dần
vocab.example: I usually play some lo-fi beats to wind down in the evening before I finally turn in for the night.
